Replaced Item ASAP

One of the items I ordered had a slight defect in the screening. I emailed customer service and had a replacement in days. In time to gift as intended. Good quality. I ordered 3 shirts, everyone loved them. Will be a repeat customer.

07/18/2024
Beautiful Dolly Parton shirts!

I looked high and low and all over the various websites for adult/child size matching Dolly Parton shirts. I wanted to find something that everyone in our group could wear when we go to Dollywood this summer. And this is wear I found exactly what I was hoping to find. These shirts are awesome!! Could not be happier! 🥰
